runs.week_type: Week E — Health entrepreneurs who certify/train other practitioners
runs.summary: Added 7 new prospects (practitioner-certification founders) based on similarity analysis of existing 32 influencers
details: Dr. Gabrielle Lyon — Muscle-Centric Medicine® cert, ~1M followers
Dr. Casey Means — Levels co-founder, metabolic health, ~766K followers
Kayla Barnes-Lentz — Female longevity, biomarker optimization, ~627K followers
Chris Kresser — ADAPT certification, 1500+ clinicians trained, ~149K followers
Dr. Stephanie Estima — Estima Certification, women's hormones, ~150K followers
Ben Bikman PhD — Insulin IQ coach cert, metabolic science, ~304K followers
Shawn Wells — World's Greatest Formulator, supplement science, ~170K followers
top_recommendations: Dr. Gabrielle Lyon — her practitioner cert network is a direct IOH pipeline
Chris Kresser — 1500+ ADAPT-trained clinicians who could add IOH blood testing
